mnemonics: CIA in the Cloud: Remember Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability as the core security triad for any cloud service.
keyPoints: The Shared Responsibility Model defines security obligations of the cloud provider vs. the cloud customer.
Identity and Access Management (IAM) is the cornerstone of cloud security, controlling who can access what.
Data encryption, both at rest and in transit, is a fundamental security control for protecting sensitive information in the cloud.
commonMistakes: Assuming cloud security is solely the provider's responsibility (ignoring the Shared Responsibility Model).
Over-provisioning access permissions for users and services, violating the principle of least privilege.
